title: ya`anah #3284
definition:
1) an unclean bird
    1a) owl, ostrich, literally translated as "daughters of the owl"
    1b) perhaps an extinct bird, exact meaning unknown
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) an unclean bird
    1a) owl, ostrich, literally translated as "daughters of the owl"
    1b) perhaps an extinct bird, exact meaning unknown

    NASB:  perh. greed
